name: Savory Crockpot Sauerbraten
recipeInstructions:
1. Add enough cider vinegar to the beef broth to make a syrup consistency.
2. Sprinkle salt and pepper on all sides of the roast.
3. Place the roast in the crockpot, add onions, broth with vinegar, brown sugar, and cover tightly.
4. Cook for 5-6 hours on high heat.
5. Remove the roast and set aside.
6. Crumble gingersnaps into the sauce in the crockpot.
7. Stir until the sauce thickens.
8. Slice the meat and serve with sauce over slices.
9. Serve with noodles.
